hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const c=i.tool_input?.content||'';const lines=c.split('\n').length;if(lines>800){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: File exceeds 800 lines ('+lines+' lines). Split into smaller, focused modules.');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)})"
